use_codes.desc: METHOD OF TREATING DISORDERS WITH AN ETIOLOGY COMPRISING OR ASSOCIATED WITH EXCESS GH-SECRETION

indications.text:
1.1 Acromegaly
SIGNIFOR LAR is indicated for the treatment of patients with acromegaly who have had an inadequate
response to surgery and/or for whom surgery is not an option.
